mapper.select: SELECT id, supplier_name, month_from, month_to, note, is_deleted, create_name, create_id, create_date, update_name, update_id, update_date FROM sp_meeting_note WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sp_meeting_note (id, supplier_name, month_from, month_to, note, create_name, create_id) VALUES (#{id}, #{supplierName}, #{monthFrom}, #{monthTo}, #{note}, #{createName}, #{createId})
mapper.update: UPDATE sp_meeting_note SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
